hooks.command: FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$FILE" | grep -q 'break_the_barriers/backend/app'; then cd /Users/autoeyes/Project/AI_Educations/Agent_Skill_Creator/apps/break_the_barriers/backend && ../.venv/bin/pytest tests/ -x -q 2>&1 | tail -8; fi
